negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: robot_008
prompt: The video opens with a static shot of a wooden countertop enclosed within a clear acrylic border, creating a controlled environment for a robotics demonstration. On the countertop, a metallic pot with two handles sits on a yellow cloth, containing a toy green broccoli. To the left of the pot, a red-handled spoon rests on the surface. In the background, a wall with rustic, whitewashed wood paneling adds texture to the scene. A robotic arm enters the frame from the left, lifting the spoon smoothly and deliberately. It moves the spoon across the countertop, placing it down to the right of the pot. The robotic arm's movements are precise and controlled, suggesting a demonstration or experiment in progress. A medium shot captures the robotic arm's interaction with the spoon and the countertop.
